name: membercore
description: MemberCore monorepo – web, mobile, and shared packages

scripts.build:ipa: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli build --profile testflight --platform ios
scripts.build:ios: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli build --profile testflight --platform ios
scripts.build:apk: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:play: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli build --profile production --platform android
scripts.build:mobile:refresh: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli build --profile production --platform all --non-interactive
scripts.submit:testflight: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile testflight --latest
scripts.ota:preview: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli update --branch preview --auto
scripts.ota:production: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli update --branch production --auto
scripts.ota:development: cd apps/mobile && npx eas-cli update --branch development --auto
scripts.deploy:hosting: firebase use membercore-f0b3f && firebase deploy --only hosting && bash scripts/publish-ota-smart.sh
